reason: Unforgiven – brutal, ambiguous look at the cost of violence in the Old West
Dances with Wolves – era’s end and moral complexity on the frontier
Young Guns – renegade outlaws face fading Wild West in revisionist pulse
Tombstone – legendary lawmen wrestle with honor and horror of violence
Wyatt Earp – haunted marshal navigates shifting moral ground at century’s turn
Lone Star – Texan border mystery blurs law and legacy in contemplative style
From Dusk Till Dawn – crime meets vampire chaos, questioning survival codes
Top Gun – aerial duels probe courage and cost in military twilight
Open Range – cattle drive and gunfight confront personal and social violence
Silverado – ensemble revisits Western grit beyond simple heroism
